title: ASR Outdoor Line Posting Hunting Boundary Hiking Trail Tape Marker Ribbon - Pink
description:
Mark your camp ground, construction site, or hiking path easily with the ASR Outdoor High Visibility Trail Marking Ribbon! The ASR Outdoor High Visibility Marking Ribbon is great for sectioning off or marking sites. Each roll of ribbon features a super bright color and has 20 feet. This ribbon is constructed of durable, weather-proof PVC so you can count on it rain or shine. The ribbon is just .06mm thick, and comes in 6 bright colors: orange, neon green, yellow, neon yellow, pink or red. Make sure to grab a roll or 2 of this tape before your next camping trip, construction job or team sport event!
